title: Skibidi Rizzler
description: The skibidi rizzler is extremly over powered, and it has 3 abilities also, ItS The gUY frOM ForTNitE!!!11!!!111!!!11
body:
It adds some items:
Skibidi Rizzler, which looks like Skibidi toilet, and is really overpowered.
It has multiple uses, and can be crafted.
- Use 1:
-   Right Click to yeet.
- Use 2: 
-   Right while sneaking to summon ore blocks.
- Use 3: 
- Left while sneaking to launch projectiles.

  
  
- It also adds Bert. Here is a video.




  ![Crafting bert and using](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bafc5013640f34faed654e346dacfc7a598f317a.gif)

It adds Quartz Brick. (single)
It adds Skibidi Essence.
It adds two Paintings, Skibidi Rizzler and Guy.
It adds a mob, Renagade Raider, that drops bot meat which makes you take damage.
It needs needs needs needs needs [https://modrinth.com/mod/hyper](https://modrinth.com/mod/hyper).

I might od missed some but yeah.  
That(75% chance)'s all folks.


DONT PLAY OLDER VERSIONS IF YOU WANT TO CRAFT STUFF
